name: A & A Pawn Shop
description_short: A & A Pawn Shop in Lancaster, OH offers collateral-based loans and pawn services. Located on N Memorial Drive with phone support available.
description_long: A & A Pawn Shop operates as a traditional pawn operation in Lancaster, Ohio, serving the local community's collateral-based lending needs. The business is physically located at 1133 N Memorial Drive in Lancaster, OH 43130, making it accessible to residents in the area. Like standard pawn shops, the company facilitates quick access to cash by accepting personal items of value as collateral. The shop maintains direct customer contact through phone support at (740) 681-7296 for inquiries and transactions. A & A Pawn Shop positions itself within the broader pawn industry, which serves consumers who need immediate liquidity without credit checks or traditional loan approval processes. The business model relies on accepting merchandise—typically jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and other valuables—and providing short-term loans secured by those items. Customers have the option to reclaim their items by repaying the loan plus interest and fees, or the shop retains the merchandise for resale. The pawn shop format appeals to consumers seeking alternatives to traditional lending when facing urgent cash needs. However, the available online information is limited to basic business directory data. The website content provided does not include details about interest rates, loan terms, accepted item categories, business hours, or specific services offered beyond the fundamental pawn shop model. This lack of detailed information limits assessment of what specifically distinguishes A & A Pawn Shop from competitors. No customer reviews, testimonials, or service descriptions are visible in the provided source material. The business appears to maintain a standard pawn shop operation without extensive online marketing or detailed service documentation.
pros: Local brick-and-mortar location in Lancaster, Ohio provides in-person service
Direct phone contact available at (740) 681-7296 for customer inquiries
No credit check required—pawn loans based on collateral value only
Immediate cash access typical of pawn shop model
Ability to reclaim personal items upon loan repayment
Listed on Yahoo Local for easy business discovery
cons: Limited online information available about rates, terms, and specific services
No published interest rates, fees, or loan term details on accessible sources
No customer reviews or ratings visible to help assess service quality
Website does not specify business hours or accepted merchandise categories
No apparent online application or service information beyond basic directory listing
best_for: Local Lancaster residents needing immediate cash against valuable collateral
Consumers without credit history or poor credit seeking collateral-based loans
Individuals with urgent short-term cash needs and disposable items to pledge
diagnosis: A & A Pawn Shop is best for Lancaster-area residents who need fast cash and have valuable items to pledge as collateral, particularly those unable to qualify for traditional credit. The main caveat is the complete absence of published rate, fee, and term information online—customers must contact the shop directly to understand borrowing costs and conditions.
services: Cash advances secured by personal items
